response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces additional performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balanced approach to these elements.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can accommodate 4000ml of sperm without overflow, while Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release a varying amount of fluid into the female during climax: a Dreamer typically expels 10-15ml, whereas an Elder Thing may inject 400-600ml.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character abilities, resulting from experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or intense squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict real-time body interactions and skin decals in VR. The hands are controlled via a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
